content.text: {"component":"messaging","summary":"Messaging presents as a governed Symfony-based messaging runtime with strong runtime scripts, API/GraphQL surface, and observability hooks; primary gap is visible CI/release automation in-repo.","strengths":["Symfony 7.4/8.0 app with API Platform, GraphQL, Messenger, Mercure, Redis, Doctrine breadth","Clear runtime governance via preflight/install/test/boot-ledger scripts","OpenAPI contract present for external surface","Observability and tracing hooks (Prometheus rules, OTEL/tracing service configs)","Solid test/tooling posture (PHPUnit, PHPStan, Panther; Playwright script scaffolding)","Structured docs assets (README, ROADMAP, owner-facing Antora report)"],"risks":["No committed CI workflows found in-repo",".dist-only PHPUnit config may require local setup for contributors","No git tags detected for release/version governance","Antora navigation/index files absent, which may limit docs surfacing"],"next_actions":["Add CI workflow to run preflight, lint, PHPStan, PHPUnit/Panther, and Playwright on PRs and main","Adopt semantic version tags and release notes to formalize cut lines","Document deployment/operations runbook linking Prometheus rules and dashboards","Add Antora nav/index entries to surface the component report in site navigation","Pin a minimal supported PHP/Symfony matrix in CI to guard ^8.4 target and 7.4/8.0 compatibility"],"notes":["Scores anchored to the current owner-facing report and repo scan; minor adjustments reflect absent CI and tagging.","Composer targets PHP ^8.4 while local runtime may vary; ensure delivery images/environments
